column1: # symbol_names.csv - the curated target-RVA -> source-symbol map.
# This is the human-grown heart of the matching loop. Each row names one
# function in the delinked target (GRUNTZ.EXE) with its real source symbol and
# records which translation unit it belongs to. scripts/rebuild.py applies this
# PDB + vostok-delinker emit a per-unit <unit>.c.obj (named symbols) that
# objdiff pairs directly against the recompiled base <unit>.obj.
#   name - exact symbol as the compiler emits it. VC5 cdecl => leading '_'
#          (e.g. _adler32). Must equal the base object's symbol for objdiff to
#   unit - source translation unit stem (no extension). All rows with the same
#          unit are grouped into one target <unit>.c.obj
# Grow this file as functions are identified; re-run scripts/rebuild.py.
# Currently scoped to zlib 1.0.4 (see docs/zlib-matching.md) but designed to
# MSVC-mangled thiscall ctor names (??0<Class>@@QAE@XZ). The vftable store is a
# DIR32 relocation; objdiff compares the code bytes (reloc target named
# differently on each side - see report).
